name: Lentil and Sweet Pepper Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small Red chili pepper (seeded and finely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the broiler. Broil the peppers until charred and blistered on all sides. Place in a plastic bag or covered dish, let cool to loosen skins.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine lentils, water, onion, and garlic. Bring to a boil, then lower heat and simmer, uncovered, for 20-25 minutes, or until lentils are tender but still slightly crunchy. Drain and add to a large bowl.
3. Meanwhile, make the dressing: Blend olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, coriander, parsley, and cumin in a blender. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Drain lentils, discard onion and garlic, and add to the bowl with the dressing. Stir well.
5. Peel and seed bell peppers over a bowl to catch juices, then slice thinly. Add to the salad along with any juices from the peppers.
6. Fold in chili peppers, red onion slices, dried apricots, and additional salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve immediately. Serves 4-6.
